description: Phase 4 ComfyUI workflow contract for optional Genesis sprite generation.
license: Drive16 project workflow metadata. External ComfyUI nodes and checkpoints keep their own licenses and run as a separate local process.

model.install: Install a Pixel Art Diffusion XL compatible checkpoint under the local ComfyUI checkpoints folder and update ckpt_name if the filename differs.

palette.transparentSource: Reserve a flat background color for the next SGDK sprite validator to map to palette index 0.

constraints: Use nearest-neighbor scaling for the final 32x32 sprite.
Quantize to one Genesis palette line with no more than 16 colors.
Keep the output inside a 4x4 tile, 32x32 hardware sprite boundary.
Do not use hosted API nodes or paid image APIs.
